feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: One Joint Venture, Multiple Equity Groups in JVA
entry.content: Is it a good practice to have a configuration where a joint venture in JVA can have multiple equity groups?

entry.title: How do the Kanban container statuses change dynamically from Green to Red as stock Drops
entry.content:
How do the Kanban container statuses change dynamically (e.g., transitioning automatically from "Full" to "Empty") based on these quantity drops?

When my Stock level come down that Bin Qty, Automatic trigger should be done by system. Will Sequence Status helps. Do we have standard Config  in system ?

#Kanban Automatic Trigger

entry.title: Stock transfer material aging report
entry.content: While Sending material using Stock transfer , sending plant GRN  date to be capture in same aging at receiving plant.

entry.title: Title: Residual Delivered Value Remains in PO History After Complete GR Reversal
entry.content:
Issue Description:

We have reversed all Goods Receipt (GR) postings for PO# 6380002240 using movement type 102. After the reversal, the net GR quantity and GR value are showing as zero in the Purchase Order history.

However, a residual delivered value of 117.30 USD is still displayed in the PO history, despite the complete reversal of all GR transactions.

 

Business Requirement:

The business would like to understand whether it is possible to completely reverse the GR and clear the delivered value from the PO history without reversing the Invoice Receipt document.

 

System Observations:

* Purchase Order: 6380002240

* All GR documents have been reversed using movement type 102.

* Net GR quantity = 0

* Net GR value = 0

* Residual delivered value displayed in PO history = 117.30 USD

* Invoice Receipt document is still active.

* PO involves multiple currencies:

  * PO/GR Currency: USD

  * Invoice/Local Currency: CAD

Analysis Performed:

entry.title: Is it possible to select specific G/L accounts in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I would like to confirm whether SAP S/4HANA Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation provides any standard option to select specific G/L accounts for valuation execution.

Our requirement is to apply a different exchange rate logic / treatment for only a few specific G/L accounts, while the rest of the foreign currency valuation should follow the normal process.

From our review so far, in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation we could only identify selection parameters such as:

  • Company Code
  • Ledger
  • Valuation Area / Rule (depending on configuration)

However, we could not find any standard option to explicitly select individual G/L accounts in the valuation run.

We also noticed that some references in SAP documentation / community discussions seem to relate to classic Foreign Currency Valuation, not necessarily Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation.

So our questions are:

  1. Is there any standard functionality in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation to restrict or select specific G/L accounts for a valuation run?
  2. If not, is there any configuration-based workaround (for example via valuation rules, account determination, semantic tags, or separate setup) to achieve different treatment for selected G/L accounts?
  3. Has anyone handled a similar business requirement where only a subset of G/L accounts needed different exchange rate treatment in Advanced FCV?

System context:

  • SAP S/4HANA
  • Using Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
  • Requirement is for selected G/L accounts to have different valuation treatment than the rest

Any clarification or references to SAP documentation / notes would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: シスログメッセージに「プロファイルパラメータの値にエラーがあります」と表示される件について
entry.content:
お世話になります。S/4 HANA 2025 FPS01環境でSAPシステムを構築中です。
SAPインスタンス起動時に下記エラーメッセージがSM21のシスログに出力されます。
対処方法についてご教授いただけますでしょうか。

2026/5/31    19:21:17    s4hcin21d_SD1_00    DP    0                Q30    プロファイルパラメータの値にエラーがあります dbms/type
2026/5/31    19:21:17    s4hcin21d_SD1_00    DP    0                Q31    > 値: Parameter READONLY m

entry.title: Asset Year change
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During the Asset year change system is throwing the program error as attached in the screenshot. Kindly check and advice correct program to change the Asset year.

Thanks & Regards,

Praveen kumar Y

entry.title: Clarification Required on AUC Asset Value Display Before Down Payment Clearing
entry.content:
We require clarification regarding the standard SAP behavior for Asset Under Construction (AUC) procurement involving vendor down payments. We were initially facing an error during the down payment process for an AUC asset. After maintaining the required G/L accounts for transaction types KTANZG (Asset Down Payment Clearing) and KTANZA (Asset Down Payment) in transaction AO90, the error was resolved and the process is now working successfully.

However, during testing, we observed a valuation issue in the asset master and would like to understand whether this is standard SAP behavior.

Test Scenario

  1. Created a Purchase Order for an AUC a

entry.title: Difference Between AA Reports and GL Reports – AUC BS accounts
entry.content:
We identified a discrepancy between values shown in Asset Accounting (AA) reports and General Ledger (GL) account reports for Assets Under Construction (AuC). After investigation, the difference appears to be related to down payments that are posted to a technical account according to the current configuration.

Issue Description

  • In AA reports, the full amount is displayed under the balance sheet GL account assigned to the AuC.
  • In GL reporting, the postings are shown differently and appear correctly based on the actual posted accounts.
  • This creates a mismatch between AA report balances and GL account report balances.

Investigation and Findings

Our analysis shows that the discrepancy is caused by down payment transactions that are posted to a technical account, as defined in system configuration. In AA reporting, these values are reflected as part of the AuC balance sheet GL account, whereas in GL reporting they remain visible in the technical account where they were actually posted.

Observed Behavior

entry.title: Plant language change from EN to JA ( Japanese) for JP00
entry.content: Kindly advise on the feasibility of changing the plant language in SAP from English to Japanese and outline the associated impacts.

entry.title: CAREER GAP
entry.content:
"I am a 2015 passed out with no experience.
I came to Hyderabad and I have been seriously learning and Practising Since 2025.
I have completed and Good at P2P, Inventory, STO, Sub-contracting, Vendor Consignment, ESM, Blanket PO, Pipe Line Scenario, RTP materials,and other special procurement processes.
Can Anyone guide me, How can I get calls?? I have applied more than 500 Jos and I have made my cv ATS Friendly."

entry.title: Help Needed
entry.content:
Hello-

I recently registered my company into the SAP Open Ecosystem Build program. My company, SONAR, is a data provider for supply chain participants. I am looking to build an integration into TM and ERP for our customers. I have been reviewing the different product offerings, but I have been unable to find what I am looking for. I believe I need access to the SAP S/4Hana Supply Chain for Transportation Management. I assumed that product offering would be under "Cloud- S/4Hana Digital Supply Chain", but I have been unsuccessful so far. Can anyone help steer me to the right place? I've reached out to partner support and they recommended I reach out here.

entry.title: Inquire about PO's with milestones (%) from PR's with totals (values)
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to ask you about the following business scenario that we have and if you could tellme if there is a Standard solution for it.

From a Purchase Requisition with X positions in which each positions is a different Item with a value, we need to convert it into a PO with the same positions. But it is needed to reflect in the header the many number of milestones (percentage for payment that add up to 100%) that represent the invoices that will arrive from the supplier in different dates.

It is needed because the integration with VIM needs those percentages values to be able to automatically post the invoices when they arrive as they will not have the value of the items nor the GR, it will have the percentage value.

¿Is there a standard way of doing this that could integrate with MM-FI-VIM?

Example:

PR:

4 positions - 1 for 50€ / 1 for 300€ / 1 for 500€ / 1 for 150€ (Total 1000€)

PO:

4 positions - 1 for 50€ / 1 for 300€ / 1 for 500€ / 1 for 150€ (Total 1000€)

3 milestones - 35% 350€/ 40% 400€/

entry.title: 599803/2026 follow up...unable to determine how to implement BadI UKM_Fill
entry.content:
Please assist in correctly implementing BadI UKM_Fill.  We need to maintain a constant MBDAT date in the "Key" in the Exposure table V_UKM_ITEM.  Per what I am reading we need to override the exposure date field (COMM_DATE) with a stable value, such as original exposure date, requested delivery date, etc.  However, I don't know where the COMM_DATE field is maintained.

Can you please provide detail instructions or code to complete this override.

entry.title: COPA Top-Down Distribution (TDD) Complex Scenario
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am configuring a Complex Top-Down Distribution (TDD) cycle in SAP S/4 HANA Margin Analysis (ACDOC_PA) using the Fiori app 'Manage Allocations'. I am facing several warnings and errors and would appreciate your guidance.

BUSINESS REQUIREMENT

I need to allocate overhead costs (account 622260) sitting on Company Code 0001 proportionally based on Net Sales (CA) from multiple Company Codes defined in a group called COPA_STE. The brand dimension WW150_PA = LEGRAND  is used to filter both sender and reference data. The reference base is a GL account group called CA4NET.

This is a cross-company code TDD: costs reside on CoCode  0001 but the reference base (sales) comes from multiple company codes (group COPA_STE).

TEMPLATE TOP DOW DISTRIBUTION

KUNNR (Customer) is set as category D = Distributed — this is the distribution characteristic.
WW150_PA (Brand) is set as category C = Retained and relevant for reference.
RBUKRS (Company Code) is set as category C = Retained and relevant for reference.

CYCLE CONFIGURATION

Allocation Context: ACDOC_PA (Margin Analysis)
Ledger: 0L
Allocation Type: TDD
Actual/Plan: I (Actual)
Transaction Currency: X

Rules:
- Sender Rule: 1 (Posted Amounts)
- Receiver Rule: 1 (Variable Portions)
- Var. Portion Type: TSL-0 (Actual Transaction Currency)
- Scale Neg. Factors: 1

Sender Details (3 criteria):
- RACCT = Single Value 622260
- RBUKRS = Single Value 0001
- WW150_PA = Single Value LEGRAND

Receivers (1 criterion):
- KUNNR = Interval 1 to 9999999999

Receiver Basis - Selection Criteria (3 criteria):
- RACCT = Initial (empty)
- RBUKRS = Group COPA_STE
- WW150_PA = Single Value LEGRAND

Receiver Basis - Reference Base Mapping for RACCT:
- Sender Data: Single Value 622260
- Reference Data: Group CA4NET

---

ISSUES ENCOUNTERED

1. Error MANAGE_ALLOC/078: Too many inputs for Single Value, Interval and Group Value.
→ Occurred when RACCT had a value in both Selection Criteria AND Reference Base Mapping simultaneously.
→ Fixed by setting RACCT to Initial in Selection Criteria and keeping the mapping only in Reference Base Mapping.

→ Result: 0 result records generated.

 

Thank you for your help

entry.title: subcontracting with account assignment Q
entry.content: Hello Support,  we want to create a  Subcontracting Purchase order with Account assignment "Q", and we want to put in the "Delivery Address"  tab the flag  "subcontracting Supplier"  filed "LBLKZ". But in this case the filed is no available for input , we wantro know why ? this is because we had another phase of subcontractin and we want to deliver the goods to another supplier.  WHY this is not possible?

entry.title: TST03 Table space issue
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have reached disk space utilization to 80%, when identifying we found TST03 table consumes more space. We have deleted some old spool requests then the table space is reduced by 25GB; however the disk utilization is reduced by only 1GB.

How can we reclaim the remaining 24GB space to minimize disk space utilization?

entry.title: Guidance Required to Reduce AUC Asset Balance Due to Vendor Refund
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Prior to SAP Go-Live on 01-Apr-2026, an opening balance of approximately USD 100,000 was uploaded to an Asset Under Construction (AUC) asset as of 31-Mar-2026.

Subsequently, the business received a refund of USD 20,000 related to the capital expenditure. As a result, the business intends to reduce the AUC balance by USD 10,000 from the uploaded opening balance.

Kindly advise on the appropriate SAP process and accounting treatment to reduce the AUC asset value, considering the balance was loaded as part of the pre-Go-Live opening balances.

Please provide the recommended transaction/process along with any configuration or master data prerequisites, if applicable.

entry.title: F107 - BTE 2750 Not able to change accounts in reversal document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As part of business requirement we would need to change the accounts for posting for 98 method. for special case like management judgement we need to modify the posting account for open items. We tried using BTE 2750 which helped changing the forward posting and we are not able to change posting in the reversal document

entry.title: Query on report Asset History Report (S_ALR_87011990)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

We are currently transferring assets within the same company code using transaction code ABUMN. As a part of the business requirement, we need to change the old cost center to new cost center for the US region. Here business is following bonus depreciation and we need a clarity while doing the asset transfer how the depreciation values to be posted to the new asset.

 

After completing the transfer and posting depreciation, we reviewed the Asset History Report (S_ALR_87011990) for depreciation areas XX with the report date of 31.05.2026. We observed the following:

 

  • Success case -For the another deactivated asset XXXXXX (Company Code XXXX, the report shows a net book value of zero.
  • Failure case - For the deactivated asset XXXXX (Company Code XXXX), the report continues to display a current net book value
